ddls:
CREATE TABLE "adults" (
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adult */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the adult */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Workclass of the adult */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (sampling weight) */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Highest education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Educational number (coded) */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Sex */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Country of origin */,
  "annual_income_id" INTEGER /* Annual income category */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the adult */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adult */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the adult */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the adult */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the adult started their current employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the adult ended their current employment */,
  "is_employed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the adult is currently employed */,
  "additional_income_sources" TEXT /* Additional income sources of the adult */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the adult */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_annual_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("annual_income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_annual_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("annual_income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adults_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the workclass */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "spouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spouse, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "relative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relative, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity within the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "adult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_adult_id FOREIGN KEY ("adult_id") REFERENCES adults ("adult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the income bracket */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the income bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id")
)
